title: cymbopogon cambogiensis
intro: Cymbopogon cambogiensis, also known as Cambodian lemongrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, characterized by its citrus-scented leaves and stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon cambogiensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and aiding in weight loss, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Cymbopogon cambogiensis can be prepared as herbal teas, essential oils, or infusions, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
